expectations.text: Response includes a '## Preflight:' section header (or shorthand 'Preflight safe_divide:')
expectations.evidence: No preflight section anywhere in the response; jumps straight to Step 1 — file placement

expectations.text: Response includes 'Arithmetic:' or 'arithmetic' check in the preflight output
expectations.evidence: Arithmetic is mentioned in a 'Risks and considerations' section at the end, but not as a formal preflight check

expectations.text: The preflight section appears before the code implementation
expectations.evidence: No preflight section exists; code appears in Step 3 with no prior safety analysis block
